name: 91App
description: Taiwans leading omni-channel retail SaaS — enables retailers to launch branded apps, mobile sites and O2O experiences.

seo.title: 91App — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: 91App: Taiwans leading omni-channel retail SaaS — enables retailers to launch branded apps, mobile sites and O2O experiences.

when_to_use: Launching branded mobile commerce apps for retail chains
Unifying online and offline sales with O2O inventory sync
Building loyalty programs across app and in-store channels
Rapid omnichannel store launch without custom engineering
Managing multi-channel promotions from a single dashboard

pros: Mature omni-channel stack for Asia retail
Branded app + mobile site in one platform
Strong O2O playbook for Taiwan market
cons: Heavy SaaS lock-in on storefront logic
review.verdict: Solid omni-channel retail SaaS if you sell in Taiwan, but a poor fit for global-first brands.
review.best_for: Taiwan and Greater China retailers launching branded commerce apps
review.not_for: Global DTC brands needing headless APIs and transparent pricing
